title: Aveiro, Centro — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Aveiro, Centro: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Aveiro is a city in Centro with a population of 78,450. Known as the Venice of Portugal for its canals and colorful moliceiro boats, with beautiful Art Nouveau architecture.
